initial_candidates.sql:
SELECT p.player_name
FROM player p
JOIN ball_by_ball b ON p.player_id = b.bowler
JOIN wicket_taken w ON b.match_id = w.match_id 
    AND b.over_id = w.over_id 
    AND b.ball_id = w.ball_id 
    AND b.innings_no = w.innings_no
GROUP BY p.player_name
ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT p.player_name
FROM player p
JOIN ball_by_ball b ON p.player_id = b.bowler
JOIN wicket_taken w ON b.match_id = w.match_id
  AND b.over_id = w.over_id
  AND b.ball_id = w.ball_id
  AND b.innings_no = w.innings_no
GROUP BY p.player_name
ORDER BY COUNT(*) ASC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT p.player_name
FROM player p
JOIN ball_by_ball b ON p.player_id = b.bowler
JOIN wicket_taken w ON b.match_id = w.match_id 
    AND b.over_id = w.over_id 
    AND b.ball_id = w.ball_id 
    AND b.innings_no = w.innings_no
GROUP BY p.player_name
ORDER BY COUNT(*) ASC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT p.player_name
FROM player p
JOIN ball_by_ball b ON p.player_id = b.bowler
JOIN wicket_taken w ON b.match_id = w.match_id
  AND b.over_id = w.over_id
  AND b.ball_id = w.ball_id
  AND b.innings_no = w.innings_no
GROUP BY p.player_name
ORDER BY COUNT(*) * 1.0 / SUM(CASE WHEN w.player_out IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) ASC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT p.player_name
FROM player p
JOIN ball_by_ball b ON p.player_id = b.bowler
JOIN wicket_taken w ON b.match_id = w.match_id 
  AND b.over_id = w.over_id 
  AND b.ball_id = w.ball_id 
  AND b.innings_no = w.innings_no
GROUP BY p.player_name
ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC
LIMIT 1;
